title: Missing `PyErr_NoMemory` in `_zoneinfo` `load_data` and `ts_to_local`
author: devdanzin
body:
# Crash report

### What happened?

It's possible to cause assertion errors due to calls returning `NULL` on OOM in `_zoneinfo`.

### Automated diagnosis:

Multiple `PyMem_Malloc`/`PyMem_Calloc` calls in `load_data` (including `ts_to_local` at line 2130) return `NULL` on OOM and goto `error` without setting an exception. The caller returns `NULL` without exception → assertion failure.

File: `Modules/_zoneinfo.c`, lines 1029-1137 (`load_data`), 2130 (`ts_to_local`)

MRE for `load_data`:
```python
import _testcapi, sys

for mod in ["zoneinfo", "_zoneinfo"]:
    if mod in sys.modules:
        del sys.modules[mod]

for n in range(1, 50):
    for mod in ["zoneinfo", "_zoneinfo"]:
        if mod in sys.modules:
            del sys.modules[mod]
    print(n)
    _testcapi.set_nomemory(n, 0)
    try:
        from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
        z = ZoneInfo("UTC")
        _testcapi.remove_mem_hooks()
        break
    except MemoryError:
        _testcapi.remove_mem_hooks()
```

MRE for `ts_to_local`:
```python
import _testcapi
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo

# Warm up imports — we only want OOM during zone construction
_ = ZoneInfo("UTC")
del _

# Clear cache so America/New_York gets re-loaded from TZif data
ZoneInfo.clear_cache()

# Persistent failure from allocation #9 onward.
# Early allocs (import machinery, arg parsing) succeed;
# the PyMem_Malloc in load_data/ts_to_local fails.
_testcapi.set_nomemory(9, 0)

z = ZoneInfo("America/New_York")  # crashes: assertion `obj != NULL'
```

Backtrace:

### CPython versions tested on:

CPython main branch

### Operating systems tested on:

Linux

### Output from running 'python -VV' on the command line:

Python 3.15.0a7+ (heads/main:e0f7c1097e1, Mar 17 2026, 18:10:52) [Clang 21.1.2 (2ubuntu6)]

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
> MRE for ts_to_local

This script triggers a bug in `Python/ceval.c`, not in `Modules/_zoneinfo.c`. I wrote https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/146117 to fix this unrelated bug.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
> MRE for load_data

This script triggers a bug in _PyFrame_GetLocals(): I wrote https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/146124 to fix it.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
> Multiple PyMem_Malloc/PyMem_Calloc calls in load_data (including ts_to_local at line 2130) return NULL on OOM and goto error without setting an exception. The caller returns NULL without exception → assertion failure.

I wrote https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/146165 to raise MemoryError on memory allocation failures.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: Thanks for your bug report. It should be fixed by https://github.com/python/cpython/commit/6450b1d142b6254d2e3b2eba47d69125ca79b3fe.
